title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: net-snmp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for net-snmp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The net-snmp packages provide various libraries and tools for the Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP), including an SNMP library, an extensible agent, tools for requesting or setting information from SNMP agents, tools for generating and handling SNMP traps, a version of the netstat command which uses SNMP, and a Tk/Perl Management Information Base (MIB) browser.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): snmptrapd: race in snmp_call_callbacks() vs handle_agentx_packet() causes crash on shutdown [rhel8] (JIRA:RHEL-64696)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
full_text:
An update for net-snmp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The net-snmp packages provide various libraries and tools for the Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP), including an SNMP library, an extensible agent, tools for requesting or setting information from SNMP agents, tools for generating and handling SNMP traps, a version of the netstat command which uses SNMP, and a Tk/Perl Management Information Base (MIB) browser.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): snmptrapd: race in snmp_call_callbacks() vs handle_agentx_packet() causes crash on shutdown [rhel8] (JIRA:RHEL-64696)
